rulings.Case Title: *** TRANSFERRED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY *** CONSERVATORSHIP OF MILTON ALLEN HALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For An Order For Reconsideration Of The Ex Parte Court Order Allowing Attorney'S Fees And Costs To Court Appointed Counsel For Conservatee
rulings.Rulings: Conservator's Motion for an Order for Reconsideration of the Ex Parte Order Allowing Attorney's Fees and Costs to Court Appointed Counsel for Conservatee is denied as untimely under CCP s 1008. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, May 30, 2017.
